title: Protoflow Tech Stack Preferences - Infrastructure
description: Deployment, monitoring, CI/CD, caching, and search

preferences.name: AWS Amplify
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, branch previews, SSR support, environment variables, CI/CD

preferences.name: Vercel
preferences.rationale: Next.js creators, excellent DX, edge functions, analytics, instant rollbacks

preferences.name: Cloudflare Pages
preferences.rationale: Fast, free tier, edge workers, unlimited bandwidth, simple deployment

avoid.name: AWS App Runner
avoid.reason: Limited control, WebSocket issues, prefer ECS Fargate for containers

preferences.name: AWS Lambda + API Gateway
preferences.rationale: Serverless, auto-scaling, pay-per-use, AWS ecosystem integration

preferences.name: AWS ECS Fargate
preferences.rationale: Containerized, serverless containers, no EC2 management, predictable pricing

preferences.name: Fly.io
preferences.rationale: Global edge deployment, simple pricing, excellent DX, Dockerfile-based

aws_projects.description: ALL AWS projects MUST configure CloudWatch and X-Ray

cloudwatch.logs: Required for all Lambda, ECS, and API Gateway
cloudwatch.alarms: Error rate, latency P99, and availability

xray.tracing: Enable active tracing on all Lambda functions
xray.subsegments: Instrument external API calls and database queries

preferences.name: Sentry
preferences.rationale: Error tracking, performance monitoring, release tracking, source maps

preferences.name: AWS CloudWatch
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, logs + metrics + alarms, Lambda insights, cost-effective

metrics.resolution: 60 seconds standard, 1 second for critical paths

preferences.name: Datadog
preferences.rationale: Full observability, APM, logs, metrics, traces, dashboards

preferences.name: New Relic
preferences.rationale: Full-stack observability, APM, infrastructure monitoring, distributed tracing

tracing.description: Distributed tracing for request tracking across services

required.aws_projects: X-Ray MUST be enabled for all AWS serverless applications

preferences.name: AWS X-Ray
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, service map visualization, trace analysis, annotations support

preferences.name: OpenTelemetry
preferences.rationale: Vendor-neutral, CNCF standard, wide ecosystem support

preferences.name: Jaeger
preferences.rationale: Open source, self-hosted, Kubernetes-native, strong community

preferences.name: GitHub Actions
preferences.rationale: Native to GitHub, matrix builds, reusable workflows, marketplace

preferences.name: AWS CodePipeline + CodeBuild
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, deep AWS integration, VPC support, cost-effective

preferences.name: GitLab CI
preferences.rationale: Native to GitLab, powerful YAML, Docker support, self-hosted runners

preferences.name: Redis (Upstash)
preferences.rationale: Serverless Redis, per-request pricing, REST API, global replication

preferences.name: AWS ElastiCache Redis
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, managed, cluster mode, auto-failover, VPC-isolated

preferences.name: Cloudflare KV
preferences.rationale: Edge key-value storage, global distribution, low latency

preferences.name: Algolia
preferences.rationale: Fast, typo-tolerance, faceting, instant search, great DX

preferences.name: Meilisearch
preferences.rationale: Open source, self-hosted, fast, typo-tolerant, simple API

preferences.name: AWS OpenSearch
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, Elasticsearch-compatible, analytics, log search

task_queues.description: Background job processing and task queues

preferences.name: Inngest
preferences.rationale: Serverless, durable functions, retries, cron, developer-first, TypeScript

preferences.name: AWS SQS + Lambda
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, serverless, FIFO queues, dead-letter queues, reliable

preferences.name: BullMQ
preferences.rationale: Redis-based, Node.js, rate limiting, priorities, repeatable jobs

infrastructure_as_code.description: Infrastructure provisioning and management as code

preferences.name: AWS CDK
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, TypeScript/Python, high-level constructs, CloudFormation under the hood

preferences.name: Terraform
preferences.rationale: Multi-cloud, declarative HCL, mature ecosystem, state management

preferences.name: AWS CloudFormation
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, JSON/YAML templates, integrated with AWS services

workflow_orchestration.description: Complex workflow and data pipeline orchestration

preferences.name: Temporal
preferences.rationale: Durable execution, workflow-as-code, retries, versioning, excellent DX

preferences.name: AWS Step Functions
preferences.rationale: AWS-native, visual workflow, serverless, AWS service integration

preferences.name: n8n
preferences.rationale: Open source, visual workflow builder, 400+ integrations, self-hosted
